name: cloudiqus-agent-bakery
description: Agent Bakery GTM — AgentCore architecture, Quick Suite catalogue, POC motion, StoreFront, governance, pricing.

skills.name: agent-bakery-gtm
skills.description: Agent Bakery go-to-market strategy — positioning, ICP, pricing, sales motion, and competitive differentiation. The Agent Bakery is CloudiQS's GenAI product, built on AWS Bedrock AgentCore.

skills.name: agent-pricing
skills.description: Agent Bakery pricing strategy — build, deploy, manage, and marketplace tiers. Discount rules, funding offsets, and how to present pricing in a sales conversation.

skills.name: agentcore-architecture
skills.description: AWS Bedrock AgentCore technical architecture — runtime, gateway, memory, tools, A2A protocol, and FAST template. Reference for Agent Bakery delivery and technical conversations.

skills.name: governance-framework
skills.description: AI governance framework for CloudiQS Agent Bakery — aligned to Singapore Model AI Governance Framework and AWS Agentic AI Competency requirements. Used in competency applications and enterprise customer conversations.

skills.name: poc-motion
skills.description: Agent Bakery POC sales motion — from first conversation to working agent in 4–6 weeks. Demo script, POC scope template, funding model, and success criteria.

skills.name: quick-suite-catalogue
skills.description: CloudiQS Quick Suite — 10 pre-built agents available for rapid deployment. Each with use case, target sector, delivery time, and pricing.

skills.name: storefront
skills.description: Agent Bakery StoreFront — AWS Marketplace listing strategy, agent packaging, discovery, and purchase flow. How CloudiQS monetises agents at scale.

commands.name: agent-proposal
commands.description: Write the full Agent Bakery proposal — problem, agent design, timeline, investment, funding, ROI.

commands.name: governance-brief
commands.description: Produce an AI governance brief for an Agent Bakery deployment — for enterprise customers or AWS competency documentation.

commands.name: gtm-pitch
commands.description: Generate a tailored Agent Bakery GTM pitch for a specific customer or sector.

commands.name: poc-design
commands.description: Design the Agent Bakery POC for a specific customer process. Scope, timeline, success criteria, funding model.
